summary: TTS | Navigation options top left when No Team is selected
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user does not have a Favorite Team set
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Favorite Team page

steps.action: WHEN the user scrolls to highlight the Arizona Diamondbacks
steps.result: THEN the app should say 'The {selected team} is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your favorite team. Move right, or down to hear additional teams to favorite. Move left to highlight the “Cancel” button.'
